ElasticSearchOpenSearchSinkWriter::new(
            self.config.clone(),
            self.schema.clone(),
            self.pk_indices.clone(),
            Self::SINK_NAME,
            self.is_append_only,
        )?.into_log_sinker

properties
                .get(ES_OPTION_INDEX_COLUMN)
                .cloned()
                .map(|n| {
                    schema
                        .fields()
                        .iter()
                        .position(|s| s.name == n)
                        .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("Cannot find {}", ES_OPTION_INDEX_COLUMN))
                }).transpose

properties
                .get(ES_OPTION_ROUTING_COLUMN)
                .cloned()
                .map(|n| {
                    schema
                        .fields()
                        .iter()
                        .position(|s| s.name == n)
                        .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("Cannot find {}", ES_OPTION_ROUTING_COLUMN))
                }).transpose

self
            .index_column
            .as_ref()
            .map(|n| {
                schema
                    .fields()
                    .iter()
                    .position(|s| &s.name == n)
                    .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("Cannot find {}", ES_OPTION_INDEX_COLUMN))
            }).transpose

self
            .routing_column
            .as_ref()
            .map(|n| {
                schema
                    .fields()
                    .iter()
                    .position(|s| &s.name == n)
                    .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("Cannot find {}", ES_OPTION_ROUTING_COLUMN))
            }).transpose

delimiter
                .as_ref()
                .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("please set the separator in the with option, when there are multiple primary key values"))?.clone

ElasticSearchOpenSearchSinkWriter::new(
            self.config.clone(),
            self.schema.clone(),
            self.pk_indices.clone(),
            Self::SINK_NAME,
            self.is_append_only,
        )?.into_log_sinker
